title: Ten Nights in a Bar Room
writer: Timothy Shay Arthur, William W. Pratt, Lillian Case Russell
actors: Baby Ivy Ward, John Lowell, Nell Clark Keller
plot: Joe Morgan, worker in a northern logging camp, falls under the influence of alcohol when a new saloon opens in the town. Eventually he becomes useless as a worker and neglects his wife and child, Little Mary. When his child comes to
